ndi.label: Neighborhood Deprivation Index (NDI)
ndi.description: Composite measure of neighborhood-level socioeconomic deprivation from US Census ACS variables.

walkability.label: EPA Walkability Index
walkability.description: EPA National Walkability Index ranking neighborhoods on walkability characteristics (intersection density, transit proximity, employment mix).

cbp_zcta5.label: Community Organization Density (ZBP)
cbp_zcta5.description: Per-capita density of 10 community organization categories (religious, civic, business, political, professional, labor, bowling, recreational, golf, sports) at the ZIP Code Tabulation Area level from Census Zip Business Patterns.

tiger_proximity.label: TIGER Road Proximity
tiger_proximity.description: Per-block-group annual distance (meters) to the nearest TIGER/Line primary road (S1100), secondary road (S1200), and primary+secondary combined, from US Census TIGER/Line shapefiles.
